task_completion.description: Configure the 'radio_emitter' Emitter node's range and channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webots interface showing the 'radio_emitter' node selected in the scene tree, with its 'range' property set to 500 and 'channel' property set to 7 in the field editor.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'status_display' Display node's width and height
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webots interface showing the 'status_display' node selected in the scene tree, with its 'width' property set to 320 and 'height' property set to 240 in the field editor.

task_completion.description: Add a Fog node at the world root level
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webots scene tree showing a 'Fog' node present at the root level (not nested inside another robot or node).

task_completion.description: Configure the Fog node's visibilityRange and fogType
task_completion.visual_evidence: Webots interface showing the 'Fog' node selected, with its 'visibilityRange' property set to 50.0 and 'fogType' property set to "EXPONENTIAL".

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog or similar Webots interface showing the file being saved as 'mining_robot_configured.wbt' in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Webots GUI to configure the nodes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots scene tree and field editor, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to modify the .wbt file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the .wbt file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type the configuration values.

integrity.description: Agent used the Webots save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Webots 'File' menu to save the world, rather than just copying or renaming files in the file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Desktop/mining_robot_configured.wbt. Emitter range: 500, channel: 7. Display width: 320, height: 240. Fog visibilityRange: 50.0, fogType: 'EXPONENTIAL'.
